channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: The Kilmar Abrego Garcia Case Remains Puzzling
item.description: Regardless of his alleged gang ties, Abrego would have been deported months ago without government maneuvering.

item.title: DOGE Culture Fiasco, a Court Decision, and Rule by ChatGPT
item.description: The first rule of cutting arts funding is to avoid appearing foolish.

item.title: Tony Blair Criticizes His Party but Avoids Full Honesty
item.description: The former UK prime minister's critique of Labour policy lacks self-reflection.

item.title: Pope Leo vs. the LinkedIn Hollow Men
item.description: How the cluttered professional network confirms warnings about AI's threat to creativity.
